queries.question: What year was the album with the shortest song released?
queries.sql: SELECT Year FROM Albums JOIN Songs ON Songs.AlbumId = Albums.id ORDER BY Length ASC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?songs a :Song .
  ?songs p:hasAlbums ?albums .
  ?albums p:Year ?year .
  ?songs p:Length ?length_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?length_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: In what month and year was David Brown's album released?
queries.sql: SELECT Year, Month FROM Albums JOIN Artists ON Artists.id = Albums.ArtistId WHERE Artists.Name = "David Brown";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?year ?month WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?albums p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?albums p:Year ?year .
  ?albums p:Month ?month .
  ?artists p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "David Brown")
}
